import sys, math
sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')
import torch
from PIL import Image
import numpy as np
from tsr.system import TSR

model = TSR.from_pretrained('/models/triposr', config_name='config.yaml', weight_name='model.ckpt')
model.renderer.set_chunk_size(131072)
model.to('cuda')

img = Image.open('/data/val/00010d96/input.png').convert('RGB')
with torch.no_grad():
    scene_codes = model([img], device='cuda')
# Try different return types
for rt in ['pt', 'pil']:
    try:
        out = model.render(scene_codes, n_views=2, return_type=rt)
        print(rt, type(out), type(out[0]), type(out[0][0]) if hasattr(out[0], '__len__') else 'NA')
        if rt == 'pt':
            t = out[0][0]
            print('  shape:', t.shape, 'dtype:', t.dtype, 'min:', t.min().item(), 'max:', t.max().item())
        else:
            print('  mode:', out[0][0].mode, 'size:', out[0][0].size)
            arr = np.array(out[0][0])
            print('  arr shape:', arr.shape, 'mean:', arr.mean())
    except Exception as e:
        print(rt, 'failed:', e)
